infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Selfie2Swipe needs access to your photo library to upload selfies and save generated profile photos.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Selfie2Swipe needs camera access to take selfies.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Selfie2Swipe needs access to save generated profile photos to your gallery.

plugins.photosPermission: Selfie2Swipe needs access to your photos to upload selfies.
plugins.cameraPermission: Selfie2Swipe needs camera access to take selfies.

plugins.photosPermission: Selfie2Swipe needs access to save generated profile photos to your gallery.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Selfie2Swipe needs permission to save photos to your gallery.
